We have already retrieved some code snippets and API lookup for Matmul. But the vanilla RNN hidden computation involves:
- Concatenating x[t] and h -> inp of shape [B, K] where K = I + H
- pre = inp @ w_i2h.t() + b_i2h -> [B, H]
- h = tanh(pre)
- y_t = h @ w_h2o.t() + b_h2o -> [B, O]

This is essentially a sequence of matrix-vector (or batched matrix) operations.
